Speakers.Speaker: Entering the Velvet Room from the City

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can access the Velvet Room from an alternate entrance in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Now you can take advantage of fast access to fusions and other Velvet Room functions without having to travel to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
